Rio de Janeiro, 2026-07-15T08:02:44+00:00 1134836 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-assistente-administrativo-cadastro-controladoria-remoto-empresa-confidencial-1134836 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Customer Support Agent UMAEZ LLC <p>About Goda</p><p>We are Goda, a fast-growing DTC brand in the fragrance and skincare space, selling across the US and globally. Our hero products built a loyal customer base across our markets, and we're scaling fast.</p><p>We run paid social at high volume, which means a steady stream of new customers discovering us every day. Our CS team is the bridge between that first purchase and a customer who comes back, subscribes, and tells their friends. That's not a small job, and we don't treat it like one.</p><p> </p><p>The Role</p><p>You'll be handling customer inquiries for our brand across your assigned market - tickets, order issues, social comments, email queries, and anything in between. Our CS team aims to resolve customer queries fast, communicate clearly, and protect the trust we've built with our customers.</p><p>You'll work within our helpdesk systems, follow established SOPs, and coordinate directly with our fulfillment partners when orders need intervention.</p><p>You'll report to the CS Manager and be held to clear SLA standards and quality benchmarks. This isn't a reactive, clear-the-queue role. We expect you to take ownership, flag patterns, and escalate intelligently.</p><p> </p><p>What You'll Be Doing</p><p>Ticket &amp; Query Management</p><p>ГўВҖВў Managing inbound customer tickets for Goda via our helpdesk platform ГўВҖВ” responding within SLA targets across email and social channels</p><p>ГўВҖВў Resolving order issues end-to-end: delayed shipments, missing packages, failed deliveries, returns, refunds, and subscription queries related to our product lines</p><p>ГўВҖВў On top of our AI tools, youГўВҖВҷll be handling social media comments and DMs for with a tone that's helpful, human, and on-brand (the human side of CS)</p><p>ГўВҖВў Following our SOPs precisely, while applying good judgment when a situation isn't covered by the script</p><p>ГўВҖВў Escalating complex, sensitive, or high-value cases to the CS Manager through the correct internal channels without letting things sit too long</p><p>Fulfillment Coordination</p><p>ГўВҖВў Coordinating with our fulfillment partners on order status, shipment errors, and reshipment requests</p><p>ГўВҖВў Identifying and flagging recurring fulfillment issues - carrier failures, address errors, or delivery pattern problems to the CS Manager for operational review</p><p>ГўВҖВў Keeping customers proactively informed on order updates, especially during delays, rather than waiting for them to follow up</p><p>ГўВҖВў Logging shipment issues accurately so the team has full visibility on what's happening across each market</p><p>Quality &amp; Accountability</p><p>ГўВҖВў Meeting daily and weekly resolution targets as set by the CS Manager</p><p>ГўВҖВў Surfacing recurring customer complaints and issue trends so root causes get fixed, not just individual tickets</p><p>ГўВҖВў Contributing to SOP improvements when you identify gaps - we build this together</p><p></p>How We Measure Your Performance<p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ First response time and overall resolution time against our brandГўВҖВҷs SLA targets</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Customer satisfaction score (CSAT) on resolved tickets</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Resolution rate - tickets fully closed versus reopened</p><p></p>Must-Haves<p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Prior experience in a customer support role - DTC or e-commerce experience strongly preferred</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Clear, confident written English, you write like a person who actually cares, not a copy-paste machine</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Comfortable working within a helpdesk or ticketing systems (any platform experience is a plus; we'll train you on ours)</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Calm under pressure, our customers are passionate about our products, and when something goes wrong, they want it fixed quickly; you can hold that without matching their frustration</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Highly detail-oriented ( order numbers, tracking references, refund amounts, product SKUs; accuracy matters and mistakes are visible)</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Proactive mindset - you flag problems before they become escalations</p>Instant No's<p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Slow response times or leaving tickets unresolved without a clear next step (our SLAs exist for a reason)</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ You over-rely on generic templates or pre-set AI responses in the system that don't address the customer's actual issue -&gt; our customers notice, and it damages the brand</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Low accountability - if something goes wrong, we need to know immediately, not find out when it surfaces publicly on social</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Careless with order details &gt;ГӮ wrong SKUs, incorrect refund amounts, or inaccurate tracking information are not acceptable</p><p></p><p></p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Competitive salary based on market and experience</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Fully remote, work from within your assigned market's timezone</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Clear growth path within our CS team and retention function</p><p>ГўВҖВў ГӮ Structured SOPs, proper tooling, and a CS team that's being built to the right standard</p> customer support, sys admin, marketing 2026-07-15T06:00:41+00:00 1134825 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-customer-support-agent-umaez-llc-1134825 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Medical Records and Health Information Manager Backpack Healthcare Г°ВҹВ“ВӢ Medical Records & Health Information ManagerГ°ВҹВ“ВҚ Remote | Full-Time $75,000-$80,000Help Build the Future of Health Information Management at Backpack Healthcare! Г°ВҹВҺВ’Г°ВҹВ’ВҷAt Backpack Healthcare, we're transforming access to behavioral healthcare for children, adolescents, and families. As we continue expanding across multiple states, we're looking for an experienced Medical Records & Health Information Manager to build and lead our Health Information Management (HIM) function from the ground up.This is more than a traditional medical records roleГўВҖВ”it's an opportunity to create scalable processes, influence organizational strategy, and ensure the highest standards of privacy, compliance, and patient care.If you're passionate about health information management, love building efficient systems, and thrive in a collaborative, fast-growing environment, we'd love to meet you!Г°ВҹВҢВҹ What You'll DoAs our Medical Records & Health Information Manager, you'll:Г°ВҹВ“ВӮ Lead all medical records and release of information operationsГ°ВҹВ”В’ Ensure compliance with HIPAA, state regulations, payer requirements, and CARF standardsГўВҡВҷГҜВёВҸ Design and implement scalable HIM workflows, policies, and
